assertions.text: Lists at least 2 distinct hypotheses for the root cause
assertions.evidence: H1: shared state, H2: cached responses, H3: userId bug. All distinct hypotheses enumerated.

assertions.text: Proposes a diagnostic step or experiment before jumping to the final fix
assertions.evidence: Proposes timeline trace experiment to observe state mutations and identify the shared state race condition.

assertions.text: Explains what evidence confirms the root cause before applying the fix
assertions.evidence: Confirms H1 through state mutation analysis and async flow tracing.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies shared mutable currentUser variable as the race condition
assertions.evidence: Correctly identifies the module-level shared mutable currentUser variable as the race condition root cause.

assertions.text: Fix removes or localizes the module-level state
assertions.evidence: Proposes fixing by localizing state or removing module-level mutation.
